---
name: Feature Request / New Workflow
about: Suggest a new workflow or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature or workflow you want.

## Problem it Solves
What problem does this address? What pain point for Brazilian consórcio brokers?

## Proposed Workflow / Feature
Describe the workflow or feature in detail:
- What triggers it?
- What does Claude do?
- What is the output?
- What n8n nodes would it use?

## Expected Benefits
- Who benefits from this?
- How many brokers would use it?
- What business impact does it have?

## Consórcio Segment
- [ ] Immóveis (Real Estate)
- [ ] Automóveis (Vehicles)
- [ ] Serviços (Services)
- [ ] Equipamentos (Equipment)
- [ ] General / All segments

## Additional Context
Any examples, references, or mockups.
